description: Featurebase is a customer feedback and product communication platform with feedback boards, support inbox, changelogs, help center content, surveys, and user management. Teams use it to collect feedback, manage support conversations, publish updates, and maintain customer-facing documentation.
summary: Featurebase exposes a hosted REST API at `https://do.featurebase.app/v2` authenticated with a Featurebase API key, plus a hosted MCP server installed from Featurebase settings using OAuth-based connector authorization.
